ariaSpec.usage: Announces the slider role of the Rating element.
The Rating needs an accessible name to be assigned to it.
Specifies the currently selected value in the Rating.
Specifies the minimum available value in the Rating.
Specifies the maximum available value in the Rating.
The element must be focusable. Disabled ratings are removed from tab order.
Rendered only when the Rating is disabled.
Rendered only when the Rating is readonly. Readonly ratings remain focusable but their value cannot be changed.

kbSpec.behavior: Decreases value by one rating step.
Increases value by one rating step.
Sets value to the Min available value in the Rating.
Sets value to the Max available value in the Rating.
